home.heroTitle: Your Trusted Partner in the Vegetable Oil Value Chain
home.heroSubtitle: High-quality processing, secure storage, and reliable shipping from Ukraine's deepest port.
home.aboutText: Allseeds Group Ensures the Efficient and Reliable Delivery of Ukrainian Vegetable Oil and Meal to the Global Markets
home.activitiesIntro: From oilseed procurement through industrial-scale processing, efficient storage and terminal operations, to global delivery — Allseeds manages every step of the vegetable oil value chain.
home.sustainabilityTitle: Committed to People, Planet, and Progress
home.sustainabilityIntro: Sustainable growth means doing business the right way — protecting the environment, ensuring product quality and safety, and investing in our people and communities.
home.peopleIntro: With 25+ years of expertise in agricultural commodity trading, our team brings together deep market knowledge, operational excellence, and a commitment to integrity and continuous development.
home.careersIntro: Join our innovative agribusiness team and build your career at the intersection of agriculture, finance and global trade.

activities.procurementDesc: Sourcing sunflower, rapeseed and soybeans from over 2,000 trusted suppliers across Ukraine.
activities.processingDesc: Three crushing plants with a combined 725,000 MT/year capacity producing premium oil and meal.
activities.storageDesc: 100,000 MT oil storage, Panamax vessel loading, and multimodal logistics solutions.
activities.tradingDesc: Delivering to markets across the EU, India, China, North Africa and the Middle East.
activities.inlandDesc: 47 dump trucks and 44 tanker trucks ensuring reliable delivery across Ukraine.

sustainability.pageTitle2: Committed to People, Planet, and Progress
sustainability.pageSubtitle: Sustainable growth means doing business the right way — protecting the environment, ensuring product quality and safety, and investing in our people and communities.
sustainability.environmentalDesc: Energy-efficient production, waste minimisation, and 95% sea freight for lower emissions.
sustainability.qualityDesc: Guaranteed national and international standards, independent laboratory testing, continuous monitoring.
sustainability.socialDesc: Employee safety, continuous onsite training, offsite educational programs, support for local communities.

people.pageSubtitle: With 25+ years of expertise in agricultural commodity trading, our team combines deep market knowledge, operational excellence, and a commitment to integrity and continuous development.
people.joinUsIntro: We are always looking for talented professionals who share our passion for agricultural trade.

company.pageSubtitle: A vertically integrated agricultural group with a global reach.

contact.pageSubtitle: Get in touch with the right team for your enquiry.
